fr:resource.fr:resource-source: \begin {tikzpicture}[diagram] \SpliceDiagramSquare <l/>{ nw = U, sw = X, ne = A, se = L{\mathopen {}\left (A\right )\mathclose {}}, nw/style = pullback, north/style = {exists,->}, west/style = {exists,open immersion}, east/style = open immersion, ne/style = pullback, } \SpliceDiagramSquare <r/>{ glue target = l/, glue = west, east/style = open immersion, ne = {\mathopen {}\left \{1\right \}\mathclose {}}, se = \mathbb {I}, } \end {tikzpicture}
